WANDERER-CHUDAN_POWER.title: Chudan Stance
WANDERER-CHUDAN_POWER.description: Whenever you play an attack, gain 2 strength this turn.
WANDERER-CHUDAN_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever you play an attack, gain 2 strength this turn.
WANDERER-HASSO_POWER.title: Hasso Stance
WANDERER-HASSO_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, draw 1 additional card.
WANDERER-HASSO_POWER.smartDescription: At the start of your turn, draw 1 additional card.
WANDERER-GEDAN_POWER.title: Gedan Stance
WANDERER-GEDAN_POWER.description: Whenever you fully block an attack, apply 2 weak and 2 vulnerable.
WANDERER-GEDAN_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever you fully block an attack, apply 2 weak and 2 vulnerable.
WANDERER-FLOW_POWER.title: Flow
WANDERER-FLOW_POWER.description: Whenever you enter a stance, gain {Amount} block.
WANDERER-FLOW_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever you enter a stance, gain {Amount} block.
WANDERER-TORRENT_POWER.title: Torrent
WANDERER-TORRENT_POWER.description: Whenever you enter a stance, deal {Amount} damage to ALL enemies.
WANDERER-TORRENT_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever you enter a stance, deal {Amount} damage to ALL enemies.
WANDERER-JODAN_POWER.title: Jodan
WANDERER-JODAN_POWER.description: Attacks deal double damage. At the end of your turn, gain 1 Vulnerable.
WANDERER-JODAN_POWER.smartDescription: Attacks deal double damage. At the end of your turn, gain 1 Vulnerable.
WANDERER-WAKI_POWER.title: Waki
WANDERER-WAKI_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, add Sly to a card in hand this turn.
WANDERER-WAKI_POWER.smartDescription: At the start of your turn, add Sly to a card in hand this turn.
WANDERER-WAKI_POWER.selectionScreenPromp: Select a card to add Sly to for this turn.
WANDERER-SHINIGAMI_POWER.title: Shinigami
WANDERER-SHINIGAMI_POWER.description: Reduce damage taken and hp loss to 1. Exhaust {Amount} cards to resurrect.
WANDERER-SHINIGAMI_POWER.smartDescriptio: Reduce damage taken and hp loss to 1. Exhaust {Amount} cards to resurrect.
